lines.speaker: Gourmet
lines.text: Ooh, a surface-dweller! Have you got any exotic surface foods to sell?

lines.speaker: Gourmet
lines.text: A pity. Dorgeshuun food seems so dull now I've tasted surface food.

lines.speaker: Gourmet
lines.text: Splendid! Show me what you've got!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What kinds of food do you like?

lines.speaker: Gourmet
lines.text: All kinds! I don't want to keep eating the same food, even if I like it. I want to try new tastes!

lines.speaker: Gourmet
lines.text: Why not try something on me and see if I like it?

lines.speaker: Gourmet
lines.text: That's all very well, but do you have anything edible?

lines.speaker: Gourmet
lines.text: Eww! That looks disgusting! There's no way I'm buying that.

lines.speaker: Gourmet
lines.text: What's the point of selling me Dorgeshuun foods? I want to experience exotic surface cuisine!
